nasb.text: This temple was completed on the third day of the month Adar; it was the sixth year of the reign of King Darius.

esv.text: and this house was finished on the third day of the month of Adar, in the sixth year of the reign of Darius the king.

cnv.text: 這殿在大利烏王在位的第六年亞達月初三日，完成了。

ccb.text: 大流士王第六年亚达月三日，建殿工程竣工。
